name: RevitMCPCommandSet
description: Basic command collection for Revit AI assistance

commands.description: Execute dynamic C# code in Revit with access to the Document and Revit API
Query Revit runtime API symbols and members from the lookup engine bridge
Return RevitLookup-style root objects grouped by runtime type for current selection or active view
Return inheritance-aware member groups for a browsable RevitLookup object handle
Expand only explicitly requested members from a browsable RevitLookup object handle
Navigate a complex RevitLookup value handle as the next browsable object layer
